description_long: This is a large, rectangular school complex surrounded by a green lawn and enclosed by a perimeter fence. The main building is centrally located, featuring a flat roof and multiple entry points, with several smaller auxiliary structures distributed around the property. The grounds include landscaped areas with trees, shrubs, and paved walkways, as well as outdoor seating and gathering spaces. There are visible parking and drop-off zones, and the property is bordered by a long driveway or access road. The school grounds are well-organized, with clear separations between the main building, outdoor amenities, and service areas. The overall design is functional and modern, with an emphasis on accessibility and open space.
description: A modern, rectangular school complex with a central building, landscaped grounds, and auxiliary structures, all enclosed by a perimeter fence. Features include paved walkways, parking areas, and outdoor gathering spaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main school building, green lawn, and a long driveway extending to the left.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the central building, surrounding landscaping, and auxiliary structures at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view with auxiliary buildings in the foreground and the main school building set back, showing more of the driveway and service areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the driveway and parking area in the foreground, and the main building and landscaping visible behind.
